input.question: We are a student engineering team designing a vehicle for the FSAE competition. Attached is the FSAE rules document. What does rule F.7.1.5 state exactly? Answer with only the text of the rule and no other words.

retrieved_context:
RULE: f.7.1.5
            TITLE: composite monocoques must:

            CONTENT:
            rule F.7.1.5: Composite monocoques must:
F.7.1.5 Composite monocoques must: 
a. Meet the materials requirements in F.4 Composite and Other Materials 
b. Use data from the laminate testing results as the basis for any strength or stiffness 
calculations

final_answer: F.7.1.5 Composite monocoques must: a. Meet the materials requirements in F.4 Composite and Other Materials b. Use data from the laminate testing results as the basis for any strength or stiffness calculations
